FROM v_project_contract

（查询返回0行，但实际数据中存在包含'钢铁'的项目名称）

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_project_finance_summary（项目财务汇总，已聚合，每个项目一行）:
  project_contract_id, contract_no, project_name,
  contract_price_yuan, charge_person_name,
  party_company_name, subcon_company_name,
  contract_status,
  receipt_invoice_count, receipt_invoice_total_yuan,
  payment_invoice_count, payment_invoice_total_yuan,
  receive_count, receive_total_yuan,
  payment_count, payment_total_yuan,
  create_time, update_time

视图 v_user（系统用户/业务员）:
  user_id, user_name, phone_number,
  email, employee_no, account,
  settlement_type, last_login_time,
  create_time, update_time

[查询任务]
查询每位业务员负责的项目中，收款率（收款总额/合同总金额）最高的前5名，收款率以百分比表示。
output:
SELECT pf.charge_person_name,
       SUM(pf.contract_price_yuan) AS total_contract,
       SUM(pf.receive_total_yuan) AS total_receive,
       ROUND(SUM(pf.receive_total_yuan) / NULLIF(SUM(pf.contract_price_yuan), 0) * 100, 2) AS receive_rate_pct
FROM v_project_finance_summary pf
GROUP BY pf.charge_person_name
ORDER BY receive_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 5;

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_receive_payment（收款记录）:
  receive_payment_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT), receipt_invoice_id(INT),
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  receive_time(TIMESTAMP), receive_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  receive_form(VARCHAR), create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
找出近12个月（从当前月份往前推12个月）每个月的收款总额。
output:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(receive_time, '%Y-%m') AS month,
       SUM(receive_price_yuan) AS total_yuan
FROM v_receive_payment
WHERE receive_time >= DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 11 MONTH)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(receive_time, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month;

output:
SELECT project_contract_id, project_name,
       COUNT(*) AS invoice_count,
       SUM(invoice_price_yuan) AS total_yuan
FROM v_receipt_invoice
GROUP BY project_contract_id, project_name
ORDER BY total_yuan DESC
LIMIT 20;

output:
SELECT ri.receipt_invoice_id, ri.project_name,
       ri.invoice_price_yuan, ri.invoice_time

WHERE rp.receive_payment_id IS NULL
ORDER BY ri.invoice_time;

[查询任务]
查询近12个月（从当前月份往前推12个月）每个月的收款总额。
output:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(receive_time, '%Y-%m') AS month,
       SUM(receive_price_yuan) AS total_yuan
FROM v_receive_payment
WHERE receive_time >= DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 11 MONTH)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(receive_time, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month;

  receipt_invoice_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT),
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  invoice_time(TIMESTAMP), invoice_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  tax_rate(INT,×10存储), tax_yuan(DECIMAL),
  invoice_type(VARCHAR), invoice_class(VARCHAR),
  customer_settlement(TINYINT), sales_settlement(TINYINT),

[查询任务]
查询2024年第一季度（1月至3月）每个月的开票金额汇总。
output:

       SUM(invoice_price_yuan) AS total_yuan
FROM v_receipt_invoice
WHERE invoice_time >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_time < '2024-04-01'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(invoice_time, '%Y-%m')

       SUM(invoice_price_yuan) AS total_yuan
FROM v_receipt_invoice
WHERE invoice_time >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_time < '2024-04-01'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(invoice_time, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month;

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_cost_contract（成本合同）:
  cost_contract_id, contract_no, cost_contract_no,
  project_contract_id, project_name,
  contract_price_yuan, tax_rate,
  charge_person_id, charge_person_name,
  customer_id, customer_name,
  subcon_company_id, subcon_company_name,
  sign_time, contract_status,
  status, finish_date,
  create_time, update_time

视图 v_payment（付款记录）:
  payment_id, project_contract_id, cost_contract_id,
  project_name, charge_person_id, charge_person_name,
  customer_id, customer_name,
  subcon_company_id, subcon_company_name,
  party_company_id, party_company_name,
  payment_time, payment_price_yuan,
  payment_form, create_time, update_time

[查询任务]
查询成本合同金额与实际付款金额的差值，返回合同编号、项目名称、合同金额、已付金额和未付差额。
output:
SELECT cc.cost_contract_no, cc.project_name,
       cc.contract_price_yuan AS contract_yuan,
       COALESCE(SUM(p.payment_price_yuan), 0) AS paid_yuan,
       cc.contract_price_yuan - COALESCE(SUM(p.payment_price_yuan), 0) AS unpaid_yuan
FROM v_cost_contract cc
LEFT JOIN v_payment p ON cc.cost_contract_id = p.cost_contract_id
GROUP BY cc.cost_contract_id, cc.cost_contract_no,
         cc.project_name, cc.contract_price_yuan
ORDER BY unpaid_yuan DESC;

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_receipt_invoice（收票记录）:
  receipt_invoice_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT),
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  invoice_time(TIMESTAMP), invoice_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  tax_rate(INT,×10存储), tax_yuan(DECIMAL),
  invoice_type(VARCHAR), invoice_class(VARCHAR),
  customer_settlement(TINYINT), sales_settlement(TINYINT),
  company_settlement(TINYINT), is_deduction(TINYINT),
  pay_price_yuan(DECIMAL), settlement_date(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

视图 v_receive_payment（收款记录）:
  receive_payment_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT), receipt_invoice_id(INT),
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  receive_time(TIMESTAMP), receive_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  receive_form(VARCHAR), create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
统计每个项目的开票总额和收款总额，返回两者均大于0的项目及其收款完成率。
output:
SELECT ri.project_contract_id,
       ri.project_name,
       SUM(ri.invoice_price_yuan) AS total_invoiced,
       COALESCE(rp.total_received, 0) AS total_received,
       ROUND(COALESCE(rp.total_received, 0) /
             NULLIF(SUM(ri.invoice_price_yuan), 0) * 100, 2) AS receive_rate_pct
FROM v_receipt_invoice ri
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT project_contract_id, SUM(receive_price_yuan) AS total_received
    FROM v_receive_payment
    GROUP BY project_contract_id
) rp ON ri.project_contract_id = rp.project_contract_id
GROUP BY ri.project_contract_id, ri.project_name, rp.total_received
HAVING SUM(ri.invoice_price_yuan) > 0
ORDER BY receive_rate_pct DESC;

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_project_finance_summary（项目财务汇总，已聚合，每个项目一行）:
  project_contract_id(INT), contract_no(VARCHAR), project_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_price_yuan(DECIMAL), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_name(VARCHAR), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_status(VARCHAR),
  receipt_invoice_count(BIGINT), receipt_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_invoice_count(BIGINT), payment_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  receive_count(BIGINT), receive_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_count(BIGINT), payment_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
按负责人统计其所有项目的合同总金额、收票总额和收款总额。
output:
SELECT charge_person_name,
       COUNT(*) AS project_count,
       SUM(contract_price_yuan) AS total_contract_yuan,
       SUM(receipt_invoice_total_yuan) AS total_receipt_yuan,
       SUM(receive_total_yuan) AS total_receive_yuan
FROM v_project_finance_summary
GROUP BY charge_person_name
ORDER BY total_contract_yuan DESC;

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_project_finance_summary（项目财务汇总，已聚合，每个项目一行）:
  project_contract_id(INT), contract_no(VARCHAR), project_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_price_yuan(DECIMAL), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_name(VARCHAR), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_status(VARCHAR),
  receipt_invoice_count(BIGINT), receipt_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_invoice_count(BIGINT), payment_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  receive_count(BIGINT), receive_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_count(BIGINT), payment_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
查询已开票但尚未收款（receive_total_yuan = 0 且 receipt_invoice_count > 0）的项目列表。
output:
SELECT project_contract_id, project_name,
       receipt_invoice_total_yuan, receive_total_yuan,
       charge_person_name
FROM v_project_finance_summary
WHERE receipt_invoice_count > 0
  AND (receive_total_yuan = 0 OR receive_total_yuan IS NULL)
ORDER BY receipt_invoice_total_yuan DESC;

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_project_finance_summary（项目财务汇总，已聚合，每个项目一行）:
  project_contract_id(INT), contract_no(VARCHAR), project_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_price_yuan(DECIMAL), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_name(VARCHAR), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_status(VARCHAR),
  receipt_invoice_count(BIGINT), receipt_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_invoice_count(BIGINT), payment_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  receive_count(BIGINT), receive_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_count(BIGINT), payment_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

视图 v_user（系统用户/业务员）:
  user_id(INT), user_name(VARCHAR), phone_number(VARCHAR),
  email(VARCHAR), employee_no(VARCHAR), account(VARCHAR),
  settlement_type(VARCHAR), last_login_time(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
查询每位业务员负责的项目中，收款率（收款总额/合同总金额）最高的前5名，收款率以百分比表示。
output:
SELECT pf.charge_person_name,
       SUM(pf.contract_price_yuan) AS total_contract,
       SUM(pf.receive_total_yuan) AS total_receive,
       ROUND(SUM(pf.receive_total_yuan) / NULLIF(SUM(pf.contract_price_yuan), 0) * 100, 2) AS receive_rate_pct
FROM v_project_finance_summary pf
GROUP BY pf.charge_person_name
ORDER BY receive_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 5;

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_project_finance_summary（项目财务汇总，已聚合，每个项目一行）:
  project_contract_id(INT), contract_no(VARCHAR), project_name,
  contract_price_yuan, charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_name, subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_status(VARCHAR),
  receipt_invoice_count(BIGINT), receipt_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_invoice_count, payment_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  receive_count, receive_total_yuan,
  payment_count(BIGINT), payment_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  create_time, update_time(TIMESTAMP)

视图 v_user（系统用户/业务员）:
  user_id(INT), user_name, phone_number,
  email(VARCHAR), employee_no(VARCHAR), account(VARCHAR),
  settlement_type(VARCHAR), last_login_time(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
查询每位业务员负责的项目中，收款率（收款总额/合同总金额）最高的前5名，收款率以百分比表示。
output:
SELECT pf.charge_person_name,
       SUM(pf.contract_price_yuan) AS total_contract,
       SUM(pf.receive_total_yuan) AS total_receive,
       ROUND(SUM(pf.receive_total_yuan) / NULLIF(SUM(pf.contract_price_yuan), 0) * 100, 2) AS receive_rate_pct
FROM v_project_finance_summary pf
GROUP BY pf.charge_person_name
ORDER BY receive_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 5;

input:

视图 v_receipt_invoice（收票记录）:
  receipt_invoice_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT),
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  invoice_time(TIMESTAMP), invoice_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  tax_rate(INT,×10存储), tax_yuan(DECIMAL),
  invoice_type(VARCHAR), invoice_class(VARCHAR),
  customer_settlement(TINYINT), sales_settlement(TINYINT),
  company_settlement(TINYINT), is_deduction(TINYINT),
  pay_price_yuan(DECIMAL), settlement_date(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
按年份统计收票总金额，同时计算每年相比上一年的增长额。
output:
SELECT
    YEAR(invoice_time) AS year,
    SUM(invoice_price_yuan) AS total_yuan,
    SUM(invoice_price_yuan) - LAG(SUM(invoice_price_yuan))
        OVER (ORDER BY YEAR(invoice_time)) AS yoy_change
FROM v_receipt_invoice
WHERE invoice_time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY YEAR(invoice_time)
ORDER BY year;

       ROUND(receive_total_yuan / contract_price_yuan * 100, 2) AS receive_rate_pct

  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id, charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id, customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id, party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id, subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),

       SUM(invoice_price_yuan) AS total_yuan

GROUP BY charge_person_name

       SUM(receipt_invoice_total_yuan) AS total_receipt_yuan,
       SUM(receive_total_yuan) AS total_receive_yuan
FROM v_project_finance_summary
GROUP BY charge_person_name
ORDER BY total_contract_yuan DESC;

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_cost_contract（成本合同）:
  cost_contract_id(INT), contract_no(VARCHAR), cost_contract_no(VARCHAR),
  project_contract_id(INT), project_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_price_yuan(DECIMAL), tax_rate(INT,×10存储),
  charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  sign_time(TIMESTAMP), contract_status(VARCHAR),
  status(TINYINT), finish_date(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

视图 v_payment（付款记录）:
  payment_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT), cost_contract_id(INT),
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  payment_time(TIMESTAMP), payment_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_form(VARCHAR), create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
查询成本合同金额与实际付款金额的差值，返回合同编号、项目名称、合同金额、已付金额和未付差额。
output:
SELECT cc.cost_contract_no, cc.project_name,
       cc.contract_price_yuan AS contract_yuan,
       COALESCE(SUM(p.payment_price_yuan), 0) AS paid_yuan,
       cc.contract_price_yuan - COALESCE(SUM(p.payment_price_yuan), 0) AS unpaid_yuan
FROM v_cost_contract cc
LEFT JOIN v_payment p ON cc.cost_contract_id = p.cost_contract_id
GROUP BY cc.cost_contract_id, cc.cost_contract_no,
         cc.project_name, cc.contract_price_yuan
ORDER BY unpaid_yuan DESC;

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_subcon_company（分包公司）:
  subcon_company_id(INT), company_name(VARCHAR), tel(VARCHAR), bank_account(VARCHAR)

视图 v_receipt_invoice（收票记录）:
  receipt_invoice_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT),
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  invoice_time(TIMESTAMP), invoice_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  tax_rate(INT,×10存储), tax_yuan(DECIMAL),
  invoice_type(VARCHAR), invoice_class(VARCHAR),
  customer_settlement(TINYINT), sales_settlement(TINYINT),
  company_settlement(TINYINT), is_deduction(TINYINT),
  pay_price_yuan(DECIMAL), settlement_date(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
按年份统计收票总金额，同时计算每年相比上一年的增长额。
output:
SELECT
    YEAR(invoice_time) AS year,
    SUM(invoice_price_yuan) AS total_yuan,
    SUM(invoice_price_yuan) - LAG(SUM(invoice_price_yuan))
        OVER (ORDER BY YEAR(invoice_time)) AS yoy_change
FROM v_receipt_invoice
WHERE invoice_time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY YEAR(invoice_time)
ORDER BY year;

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_project_contract（项目合同）:
  project_contract_id(INT), contract_no(VARCHAR), project_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_price_yuan(DECIMAL), tax_rate(INT,×10存储,如130=13%),
  charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  sign_time(TIMESTAMP), contract_start_time(TIMESTAMP), contract_end_time(TIMESTAMP),
  project_start_time(TIMESTAMP), project_end_time(TIMESTAMP),
  contract_status(VARCHAR), settlement_type(VARCHAR),
  finish_date(TIMESTAMP), is_permission(TINYINT),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
统计各分包公司承接的项目数量和合同总金额，只显示合同总金额超过100万的分包公司。
output:
SELECT subcon_company_name,
       COUNT(*) AS project_count,
       SUM(contract_price_yuan) AS total_yuan
FROM v_project_contract
GROUP BY subcon_company_name
HAVING SUM(contract_price_yuan) > 1000000
ORDER BY total_yuan DESC;

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_cost_contract（成本合同）:
  cost_contract_id(INT), contract_no(VARCHAR), cost_contract_no(VARCHAR),
  project_contract_id(INT), project_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_price_yuan(DECIMAL), tax_rate(INT,×10存储),
  charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  sign_time(TIMESTAMP), contract_status(VARCHAR),
  status(TINYINT), finish_date(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

视图 v_payment（付款记录）:
  payment_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT), cost_contract_id(INT),
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  payment_time(TIMESTAMP), payment_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_form(VARCHAR), create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
返回成本合同金额与实际付款金额的差值，返回合同编号、项目名称、合同金额、已付金额和未付差额。
output:
SELECT cc.cost_contract_no, cc.project_name,
       cc.contract_price_yuan AS contract_yuan,
       COALESCE(SUM(p.payment_price_yuan), 0) AS paid_yuan,
       cc.contract_price_yuan - COALESCE(SUM(p.payment_price_yuan), 0) AS unpaid_yuan
FROM v_cost_contract cc
LEFT JOIN v_payment p ON cc.cost_contract_id = p.cost_contract_id
GROUP BY cc.cost_contract_id, cc.cost_contract_no,
         cc.project_name, cc.contract_price_yuan
ORDER BY unpaid_yuan DESC;

[查询任务]
查询中冶集团相关甲方公司承接的项目合同，返回甲方公司名称、项目名称和合同金额。
output:
SELECT pc.company_name, p.project_name, p.contract_price_yuan
FROM v_project_contract p
JOIN v_party_company pc ON p.party_company_id = pc.party_company_id

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_cost_contract（成本合同）:
  cost_contract_id(INT), contract_no(VARCHAR), cost_contract_no(VARCHAR),
  project_contract_id(INT), project_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_price_yuan(DECIMAL), tax_rate(INT,×10存储),
  charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  sign_time(TIMESTAMP), contract_status(VARCHAR),
  status(TINYINT), finish_date(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

视图 v_payment（付款记录）:
  payment_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT), cost_contract_id(INT),
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  payment_time(TIMESTAMP), payment_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_form(VARCHAR), create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
查询成本签约金额与实际付款金额的差值，返回合同编号、项目名称、合同金额、已付金额和未付差额。
output:
SELECT cc.cost_contract_no, cc.project_name,
       cc.contract_price_yuan AS contract_yuan,
       COALESCE(SUM(p.payment_price_yuan), 0) AS paid_yuan,
       cc.contract_price_yuan - COALESCE(SUM(p.payment_price_yuan), 0) AS unpaid_yuan
FROM v_cost_contract cc
LEFT JOIN v_payment p ON cc.cost_contract_id = p.cost_contract_id
GROUP BY cc.cost_contract_id, cc.cost_contract_no,
         cc.project_name, cc.contract_price_yuan
ORDER BY unpaid_yuan DESC;

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_receipt_invoice（收票记录）:
  receipt_invoice_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT),
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  invoice_time(TIMESTAMP), invoice_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  tax_rate(INT,×10存储), tax_yuan(DECIMAL),
  invoice_type(VARCHAR), invoice_class(VARCHAR),
  customer_settlement(TINYINT), sales_settlement(TINYINT),
  company_settlement(TINYINT), is_deduction(TINYINT),
  pay_price_yuan(DECIMAL), settlement_date(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
汇总每个项目的收票数量和收票总金额，按收票总金额降序排列前20名。
output:
SELECT project_contract_id, project_name,
       COUNT(*) AS invoice_count,
       SUM(invoice_price_yuan) AS total_yuan
FROM v_receipt_invoice
GROUP BY project_contract_id, project_name
ORDER BY total_yuan DESC
LIMIT 20;

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_receipt_invoice（收票记录）:
  receipt_invoice_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT),
  project_name, charge_person_id, charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name,
  party_company_id, party_company_name,
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name,
  invoice_time, invoice_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  tax_rate(INT,×10存储), tax_yuan,
  invoice_type(VARCHAR), invoice_class,
  customer_settlement(TINYINT), sales_settlement,
  company_settlement(TINYINT), is_deduction,
  pay_price_yuan, settlement_date,
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time

视图 v_receive_payment（收款记录）:
  receive_payment_id, project_contract_id(INT), receipt_invoice_id,
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id, charge_person_name,
  customer_id, customer_name,
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name,
  subcon_company_id, subcon_company_name,
  receive_time, receive_price_yuan,
  receive_form, create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time

[查询任务]
统计每个项目的开票总额和收款总额，返回两者均大于0的项目及其收款完成率。
output:
SELECT ri.project_contract_id,
       ri.project_name,
       SUM(ri.invoice_price_yuan) AS total_invoiced,
       COALESCE(rp.total_received, 0) AS total_received,
       ROUND(COALESCE(rp.total_received, 0) /
             NULLIF(SUM(ri.invoice_price_yuan), 0) * 100, 2) AS receive_rate_pct
FROM v_receipt_invoice ri
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT project_contract_id, SUM(receive_price_yuan) AS total_received
    FROM v_receive_payment
    GROUP BY project_contract_id
) rp ON ri.project_contract_id = rp.project_contract_id
GROUP BY ri.project_contract_id, ri.project_name, rp.total_received
HAVING SUM(ri.invoice_price_yuan) > 0
ORDER BY receive_rate_pct DESC;

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_project_finance_summary（项目财务汇总，已聚合，每个项目一行）:
  project_contract_id, contract_no, project_name,
  contract_price_yuan, charge_person_name,
  party_company_name, subcon_company_name,
  contract_status,
  receipt_invoice_count, receipt_invoice_total_yuan,
  payment_invoice_count, payment_invoice_total_yuan,
  receive_count, receive_total_yuan,
  payment_count, payment_total_yuan,
  create_time, update_time

[查询任务]
找出每个分包公司中合同金额最高的项目。
output:
SELECT subcon_company_name, project_name, contract_price_yuan
FROM (
    SELECT subcon_company_name, project_name, contract_price_yuan,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
               PARTITION BY subcon_company_name
               ORDER BY contract_price_yuan DESC
           ) AS rn
    FROM v_project_finance_summary
) t
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY contract_price_yuan DESC;

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_receipt_invoice（收票记录）:
  receipt_invoice_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT),
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  invoice_time(TIMESTAMP), invoice_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  tax_rate(INT,×10存储), tax_yuan(DECIMAL),
  invoice_type(VARCHAR), invoice_class(VARCHAR),
  customer_settlement(TINYINT), sales_settlement(TINYINT),
  company_settlement(TINYINT), is_deduction(TINYINT),
  pay_price_yuan(DECIMAL), settlement_date(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

视图 v_receive_payment（收款记录）:
  receive_payment_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT), receipt_invoice_id(INT),
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  receive_time(TIMESTAMP), receive_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  receive_form(VARCHAR), create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
汇总每个项目的开票总额和收款总额，返回两者均大于0的项目及其收款完成率。
output:
SELECT ri.project_contract_id,
       ri.project_name,
       SUM(ri.invoice_price_yuan) AS total_invoiced,
       COALESCE(rp.total_received, 0) AS total_received,
       ROUND(COALESCE(rp.total_received, 0) /
             NULLIF(SUM(ri.invoice_price_yuan), 0) * 100, 2) AS receive_rate_pct
FROM v_receipt_invoice ri
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT project_contract_id, SUM(receive_price_yuan) AS total_received
    FROM v_receive_payment
    GROUP BY project_contract_id
) rp ON ri.project_contract_id = rp.project_contract_id
GROUP BY ri.project_contract_id, ri.project_name, rp.total_received
HAVING SUM(ri.invoice_price_yuan) > 0
ORDER BY receive_rate_pct DESC;

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_project_contract（项目合同）:
  project_contract_id, contract_no(VARCHAR), project_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_price_yuan(DECIMAL), tax_rate(INT,×10存储,如130=13%),
  charge_person_id, charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id, customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id, party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id, subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  sign_time(TIMESTAMP), contract_start_time(TIMESTAMP), contract_end_time(TIMESTAMP),
  project_start_time, project_end_time(TIMESTAMP),
  contract_status, settlement_type(VARCHAR),
  finish_date, is_permission(TINYINT),
  create_time, update_time

视图 v_customer（客户）:
  customer_id, customer_name(VARCHAR), phone_number(VARCHAR),
  email, customer_scale, region,
  customer_category, owner_name(VARCHAR), owner_id,
  big_customer, create_time, update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
查询大客户（big_customer = 1）关联的项目合同列表，返回客户名称、项目名称和合同金额。
output:
SELECT c.customer_name, p.project_name, p.contract_price_yuan
FROM v_project_contract p
JOIN v_customer c ON p.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE c.big_customer = 1
ORDER BY p.contract_price_yuan DESC;

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_receipt_invoice（收票记录）:
  receipt_invoice_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT),
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  invoice_time(TIMESTAMP), invoice_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  tax_rate(INT,×10存储), tax_yuan(DECIMAL),
  invoice_type(VARCHAR), invoice_class(VARCHAR),
  customer_settlement(TINYINT), sales_settlement(TINYINT),
  company_settlement(TINYINT), is_deduction(TINYINT),
  pay_price_yuan(DECIMAL), settlement_date(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
找出2024年第一季度（1月至3月）每个月的开票金额汇总。
output:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(invoice_time, '%Y-%m') AS month,
       SUM(invoice_price_yuan) AS total_yuan
FROM v_receipt_invoice
WHERE invoice_time >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_time < '2024-04-01'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(invoice_time, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month;

视图 v_receive_payment（收款记录）:
  receive_payment_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT), receipt_invoice_id(INT),
  project_name, charge_person_id, charge_person_name,
  customer_id, customer_name,
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name,
  subcon_company_id, subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  receive_time(TIMESTAMP), receive_price_yuan,
  receive_form(VARCHAR), create_time, update_time

[查询任务]
查询近12个月（从当前月份往前推12个月）每个月的收款总额。
output:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(receive_time, '%Y-%m') AS month,
       SUM(receive_price_yuan) AS total_yuan
FROM v_receive_payment
WHERE receive_time >= DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 11 MONTH)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(receive_time, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month;

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_project_finance_summary（项目财务汇总，已聚合，每个项目一行）:
  project_contract_id(INT), contract_no(VARCHAR), project_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_price_yuan(DECIMAL), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_name(VARCHAR), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_status(VARCHAR),
  receipt_invoice_count(BIGINT), receipt_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_invoice_count(BIGINT), payment_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  receive_count(BIGINT), receive_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_count(BIGINT), payment_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

视图 v_user（系统用户/业务员）:
  user_id(INT), user_name(VARCHAR), phone_number(VARCHAR),
  email(VARCHAR), employee_no(VARCHAR), account(VARCHAR),
  settlement_type(VARCHAR), last_login_time(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
查询每位业务员负责的项目中，收款率（实收金额/合同总金额）最高的前5名，收款率以百分比表示。
output:
SELECT pf.charge_person_name,
       SUM(pf.contract_price_yuan) AS total_contract,
       SUM(pf.receive_total_yuan) AS total_receive,
       ROUND(SUM(pf.receive_total_yuan) / NULLIF(SUM(pf.contract_price_yuan), 0) * 100, 2) AS receive_rate_pct
FROM v_project_finance_summary pf
GROUP BY pf.charge_person_name
ORDER BY receive_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 5;

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_receive_payment（收款记录）:
  receive_payment_id, project_contract_id, receipt_invoice_id,
  project_name, charge_person_id, charge_person_name,
  customer_id, customer_name,
  party_company_id, party_company_name,
  subcon_company_id, subcon_company_name,
  receive_time, receive_price_yuan,
  receive_form, create_time, update_time

[查询任务]
查询近12个月（从当前月份往前推12个月）每个月的收款总额。
output:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(receive_time, '%Y-%m') AS month,
       SUM(receive_price_yuan) AS total_yuan
FROM v_receive_payment
WHERE receive_time >= DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 11 MONTH)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(receive_time, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month;

  receipt_invoice_count(BIGINT), receipt_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),

       receipt_invoice_total_yuan,
       payment_invoice_total_yuan,
       (receipt_invoice_total_yuan - payment_invoice_total_yuan) AS diff_yuan

ORDER BY diff_yuan DESC;

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_project_finance_summary（项目财务汇总，已聚合，每个项目一行）:
  project_contract_id(INT), contract_no(VARCHAR), project_name,
  contract_price_yuan, charge_person_name,
  party_company_name, subcon_company_name,
  contract_status,
  receipt_invoice_count, receipt_invoice_total_yuan,
  payment_invoice_count(BIGINT), payment_invoice_total_yuan,
  receive_count, receive_total_yuan,
  payment_count(BIGINT), payment_total_yuan,
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
找出每个分包公司中合同金额最高的项目。
output:
SELECT subcon_company_name, project_name, contract_price_yuan
FROM (
    SELECT subcon_company_name, project_name, contract_price_yuan,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
               PARTITION BY subcon_company_name
               ORDER BY contract_price_yuan DESC
           ) AS rn
    FROM v_project_finance_summary
) t
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY contract_price_yuan DESC;

       COUNT(*) AS project_count,
       SUM(contract_price_yuan) AS total_contract_yuan,
       SUM(receipt_invoice_total_yuan) AS total_receipt_yuan,
       SUM(receive_total_yuan) AS total_receive_yuan

GROUP BY charge_person_name
ORDER BY total_contract_yuan DESC;

output:

       receipt_invoice_total_yuan,
       payment_invoice_total_yuan,
       (receipt_invoice_total_yuan - payment_invoice_total_yuan) AS diff_yuan
FROM v_project_finance_summary

ORDER BY diff_yuan DESC;

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_project_contract（项目合同）:
  project_contract_id(INT), contract_no(VARCHAR), project_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_price_yuan(DECIMAL), tax_rate(INT,×10存储,如130=13%),
  charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  sign_time(TIMESTAMP), contract_start_time(TIMESTAMP), contract_end_time(TIMESTAMP),
  project_start_time(TIMESTAMP), project_end_time(TIMESTAMP),
  contract_status(VARCHAR), settlement_type(VARCHAR),
  finish_date(TIMESTAMP), is_permission(TINYINT),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

视图 v_customer（客户）:
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR), phone_number(VARCHAR),
  email(VARCHAR), customer_scale(VARCHAR), region(VARCHAR),
  customer_category(VARCHAR), owner_name(VARCHAR), owner_id(INT),
  big_customer(TINYINT), create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
查询大客户（big_customer = 1）关联的项目合同列表，返回客户名称、项目名称和合同金额。
output:
SELECT c.customer_name, p.project_name, p.contract_price_yuan
FROM v_project_contract p
JOIN v_customer c ON p.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE c.big_customer = 1
ORDER BY p.contract_price_yuan DESC;

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_project_finance_summary（项目财务汇总，已聚合，每个项目一行）:
  project_contract_id(INT), contract_no(VARCHAR), project_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_price_yuan(DECIMAL), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_name(VARCHAR), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_status(VARCHAR),
  receipt_invoice_count(BIGINT), receipt_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_invoice_count(BIGINT), payment_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  receive_count(BIGINT), receive_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_count(BIGINT), payment_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
找出每个分包公司中合同金额最高的项目。
output:
SELECT subcon_company_name, project_name, contract_price_yuan
FROM (
    SELECT subcon_company_name, project_name, contract_price_yuan,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
               PARTITION BY subcon_company_name
               ORDER BY contract_price_yuan DESC
           ) AS rn
    FROM v_project_finance_summary
) t
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY contract_price_yuan DESC;

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_cost_contract（成本合同）:
  cost_contract_id, contract_no, cost_contract_no(VARCHAR),
  project_contract_id(INT), project_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_price_yuan(DECIMAL), tax_rate(INT,×10存储),
  charge_person_id, charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id, customer_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name,
  sign_time, contract_status,
  status, finish_date,
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time

视图 v_payment（付款记录）:
  payment_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT), cost_contract_id,
  project_name(VARCHAR), charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id, customer_name,
  subcon_company_id, subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  payment_time, payment_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_form, create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
查询成本合同金额与实际付款金额的差值，返回合同编号、项目名称、合同金额、已付金额和未付差额。
output:
SELECT cc.cost_contract_no, cc.project_name,
       cc.contract_price_yuan AS contract_yuan,
       COALESCE(SUM(p.payment_price_yuan), 0) AS paid_yuan,
       cc.contract_price_yuan - COALESCE(SUM(p.payment_price_yuan), 0) AS unpaid_yuan
FROM v_cost_contract cc
LEFT JOIN v_payment p ON cc.cost_contract_id = p.cost_contract_id
GROUP BY cc.cost_contract_id, cc.cost_contract_no,
         cc.project_name, cc.contract_price_yuan
ORDER BY unpaid_yuan DESC;

  project_name, charge_person_id(INT), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id(INT), customer_name,
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id, subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  invoice_time(TIMESTAMP), invoice_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  tax_rate(INT,×10存储), tax_yuan,
  invoice_type, invoice_class,
  customer_settlement(TINYINT), sales_settlement(TINYINT),
  company_settlement, is_deduction,
  pay_price_yuan, settlement_date(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
按年份统计收票总金额，同时计算每年相比上一年的增长额。
output:
SELECT
    YEAR(invoice_time) AS year,
    SUM(invoice_price_yuan) AS total_yuan,
    SUM(invoice_price_yuan) - LAG(SUM(invoice_price_yuan))
        OVER (ORDER BY YEAR(invoice_time)) AS yoy_change
FROM v_receipt_invoice
WHERE invoice_time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY YEAR(invoice_time)
ORDER BY year;

output:
SELECT subcon_company_name, project_name, contract_price_yuan
FROM (
    SELECT subcon_company_name, project_name, contract_price_yuan,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
               PARTITION BY subcon_company_name
               ORDER BY contract_price_yuan DESC

    FROM v_project_finance_summary
) t
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY contract_price_yuan DESC;

  party_company_id, party_company_name,

[查询任务]

output:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(invoice_time, '%Y-%m') AS month,
       SUM(invoice_price_yuan) AS total_yuan
FROM v_receipt_invoice
WHERE invoice_time >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_time < '2024-04-01'

  receipt_invoice_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT), project_name(VARCHAR),

  customer_settlement(TINYINT), sales_settlement(TINYINT)

SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', invoice_time) AS month,
       SUM(invoice_price_yuan) AS total_yuan

GROUP BY STRFTIME('%Y-%m', invoice_time)
ORDER BY month;

       SUM(invoice_price_yuan) AS total_yuan

GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(invoice_time, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month;

[查询任务]

FROM v_project_contract p

ORDER BY p.contract_price_yuan DESC;

instruction: 你是MySQL SQL生成器。根据提供的视图Schema和查询任务，生成正确的MySQL查询语句。只输出SQL，不要解释。
input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_receipt_invoice（收票记录）:
  receipt_invoice_id, project_contract_id,
  project_name, charge_person_id, charge_person_name,
  customer_id, customer_name,
  party_company_id, party_company_name,
  subcon_company_id, subcon_company_name,
  invoice_time, invoice_price_yuan,
  tax_rate, tax_yuan,
  invoice_type, invoice_class,
  customer_settlement, sales_settlement,
  company_settlement, is_deduction,
  pay_price_yuan, settlement_date,
  create_time, update_time

视图 v_receive_payment（收款记录）:
  receive_payment_id, project_contract_id, receipt_invoice_id,
  project_name, charge_person_id, charge_person_name,
  customer_id, customer_name,
  party_company_id, party_company_name,
  subcon_company_id, subcon_company_name,
  receive_time, receive_price_yuan,
  receive_form, create_time, update_time

[查询任务]
统计每个项目的开票总额和收款总额，返回两者均大于0的项目及其收款完成率。
output:
SELECT ri.project_contract_id,
       ri.project_name,
       SUM(ri.invoice_price_yuan) AS total_invoiced,
       COALESCE(rp.total_received, 0) AS total_received,
       ROUND(COALESCE(rp.total_received, 0) /
             NULLIF(SUM(ri.invoice_price_yuan), 0) * 100, 2) AS receive_rate_pct
FROM v_receipt_invoice ri
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT project_contract_id, SUM(receive_price_yuan) AS total_received
    FROM v_receive_payment
    GROUP BY project_contract_id
) rp ON ri.project_contract_id = rp.project_contract_id
GROUP BY ri.project_contract_id, ri.project_name, rp.total_received
HAVING SUM(ri.invoice_price_yuan) > 0
ORDER BY receive_rate_pct DESC;

       COUNT(*) AS payment_count,

FROM v_receive_payment
GROUP BY receive_form
ORDER BY total_yuan DESC;

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_project_finance_summary（项目财务汇总，已聚合，每个项目一行）:
  project_contract_id, contract_no(VARCHAR), project_name(VARCHAR),
  contract_price_yuan(DECIMAL), charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_name(VARCHAR), subcon_company_name,
  contract_status,
  receipt_invoice_count(BIGINT), receipt_invoice_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_invoice_count(BIGINT), payment_invoice_total_yuan,
  receive_count, receive_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  payment_count(BIGINT), payment_total_yuan(DECIMAL),
  create_time(TIMESTAMP), update_time

[查询任务]
按负责人统计其所有项目的合同总金额、收票总额和收款总额。
output:
SELECT charge_person_name,
       COUNT(*) AS project_count,
       SUM(contract_price_yuan) AS total_contract_yuan,
       SUM(receipt_invoice_total_yuan) AS total_receipt_yuan,
       SUM(receive_total_yuan) AS total_receive_yuan
FROM v_project_finance_summary
GROUP BY charge_person_name
ORDER BY total_contract_yuan DESC;

input:

视图 v_receipt_invoice（收票记录）:
  receipt_invoice_id(INT), project_contract_id(INT),
  project_name, charge_person_id, charge_person_name,
  customer_id(INT), customer_name(VARCHAR),
  party_company_id, party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id, subcon_company_name,
  invoice_time, invoice_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  tax_rate(INT,×10存储), tax_yuan,
  invoice_type, invoice_class,
  customer_settlement(TINYINT), sales_settlement,
  company_settlement(TINYINT), is_deduction,
  pay_price_yuan, settlement_date(TIMESTAMP),
  create_time, update_time

视图 v_receive_payment（收款记录）:
  receive_payment_id, project_contract_id, receipt_invoice_id,
  project_name, charge_person_id, charge_person_name(VARCHAR),
  customer_id, customer_name,
  party_company_id(INT), party_company_name(VARCHAR),
  subcon_company_id(INT), subcon_company_name(VARCHAR),
  receive_time, receive_price_yuan(DECIMAL),
  receive_form, create_time, update_time(TIMESTAMP)

[查询任务]
查询已开票但尚未收款的收票记录（即在收票表中存在、但在收款表中没有对应记录的发票）。
output:
SELECT ri.receipt_invoice_id, ri.project_name,
       ri.invoice_price_yuan, ri.invoice_time
FROM v_receipt_invoice ri
LEFT JOIN v_receive_payment rp ON ri.receipt_invoice_id = rp.receipt_invoice_id
WHERE rp.receive_payment_id IS NULL
ORDER BY ri.invoice_time;

input:
[视图Schema]
视图 v_receipt_invoice（收票记录）:
  receipt_invoice_id, project_contract_id,
  project_name, charge_person_id, charge_person_name,
  customer_id, customer_name,
  party_company_id, party_company_name,
  subcon_company_id, subcon_company_name,
  invoice_time, invoice_price_yuan,
  tax_rate, tax_yuan,
  invoice_type, invoice_class,
  customer_settlement, sales_settlement,
  company_settlement, is_deduction,
  pay_price_yuan, settlement_date,
  create_time, update_time

[查询任务]
按年份统计收票总金额，同时计算每年相比上一年的增长额。
output:
SELECT
    YEAR(invoice_time) AS year,
    SUM(invoice_price_yuan) AS total_yuan,
    SUM(invoice_price_yuan) - LAG(SUM(invoice_price_yuan))
        OVER (ORDER BY YEAR(invoice_time)) AS yoy_change
FROM v_receipt_invoice
WHERE invoice_time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY YEAR(invoice_time)
ORDER BY year;

[视图Schema]
表 station: id(NUMBER), name(TEXT), lat(NUMBER), long(NUMBER), dock_count(NUMBER), city(TEXT), installation_date(TEXT)
表 status: station_id(NUMBER), bikes_available(NUMBER), docks_available(NUMBER), time(TEXT)
表 trip: id(NUMBER), duration(NUMBER), start_date(TEXT), start_station_name(TEXT), start_station_id(NUMBER), end_date(TEXT), end_station_name(TEXT), end_station_id(NUMBER), bike_id(NUMBER), subscription_type(TEXT), zip_code(NUMBER)
表 weather: date(TEXT), max_temperature_f(NUMBER), mean_temperature_f(NUMBER), min_temperature_f(NUMBER), max_dew_point_f(NUMBER), mean_dew_point_f(NUMBER), min_dew_point_f(NUMBER), max_humidity(NUMBER), mean_humidity(NUMBER), min_humidity(NUMBER), max_sea_level_pressure_inches(NUMBER), mean_sea_level_pressure_inches(NUMBER), min_sea_level_pressure_inches(NUMBER), max_visibility_miles(NUMBER), mean_visibility_miles(NUMBER), min_visibility_miles(NUMBER), max_wind_Speed_mph(NUMBER), mean_wind_speed_mph(NUMBER), max_gust_speed_mph(NUMBER), precipitation_inches(NUMBER), cloud_cover(NUMBER), events(TEXT), wind_dir_degrees(NUMBER), zip_code(NUMBER)

output: SELECT name FROM station WHERE lat < 37.5
